retry_reason: The operation is an unconditional reference decrement; no failure path exists, and retrying after an invalid use would be a double-free.
contract_summary: This is a release wrapper that decrements the reference count of a bpf_crypto_ctx object. It is intended as a destructor callback (dtor) for use in APIs like kfree_rcu or BPF object lifecycle management. The caller must ensure the context is valid and that this release does not exceed the reference count; after this call, the context must not be accessed. No return value is provided — the operation always succeeds.
